step_rationale: Thromboinflammatory RNA signature linked to cardiovascular risk.
mechanism: Platelet-derived thromboinflammatory RNA signature that integrates platelet activation and inflammatory signals associated with MI risk.

references.title: A platelet transcriptomic signature of thromboinflammation predicts cardiovascular risk.

trials.title: Erfassung Kardialer Funktionsparameter in MRT Und Echokardiographie Bei Patienten Mit Ethyltoxischer Leberzirrhose Und Transjugulärer Intrahepatischer Portosystemischer Shunt (TIPSS)-Anlage
